message:
perf: SIMD approximate exp for SwiGLU sigmoid + attention softmax

Adds a 4-lane minimax polynomial approximation for non-positive
exponents (≤0), accurate to ~3×10⁻⁷ relative. Drops into the two
exp hot spots: SwiGLU's sigmoid (via the negate-and-branch identity)
and the banded-attention softmax (inputs are already `score − max`).

Browser bench: 65/157/341 → 65/156/336 ms. Cross-backend span parity
unchanged (smoke 2/2).
